query:
ALTER TABLE contracts 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS customerInn varchar(12),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS customerName varchar(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS counterpartyInn varchar(12),
  MODIFY COLUMN status enum('draft','pending_customer','pending_contractor','awaiting_payment','paid','in_progress','act_signing','completed','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4ZrXh2G47LDMzHc.root --database VXtoDUdEwYg7oM9YoGZrE3 --execute ALTER TABLE contracts 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS customerInn varchar(12),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS customerName varchar(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS counterpartyInn varchar(12),
  MODIFY COLUMN status enum('draft','pending_customer','pending_contractor','awaiting_payment','paid','in_progress','act_signing','completed','rejected') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft';
